render-on-demand.Settings.Enabled.Name: Enable Render on Demand
render-on-demand.Settings.Enabled.Hint: Skip the main-screen render when nothing visual changed. Disable to always render every frame.
render-on-demand.Settings.SettleFrames.H: Render this many extra frames after each change, as a conservative correctness margin. Default 3.
render-on-demand.Settings.Debug.Name: Debug logging
render-on-demand.Settings.Debug.Hint: Log gate install and skip/render activity to the console.
